title: John 3:16
content: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life.
author: ESV

title: Psalm 23:1
content: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
author: ESV

title: Augustine on Restless Hearts
content: You have made us for yourself, O Lord, and our heart is restless until it rests in you.
author: Augustine of Hippo

title: C.S. Lewis on True Christianity
content: I am trying here to prevent anyone saying the really foolish thing that people often say about Him: I’m ready to accept Jesus as a great moral teacher, but I don’t accept His claim to be God.
author: C.S. Lewis

title: Charles Spurgeon on Prayer
content: True prayer is neither a mere mental exercise nor a vocal performance. It is far deeper than that—it is spiritual transaction with the Creator of Heaven and Earth.
author: Charles Spurgeon
